name: High-Protein Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine bran flakes, raisins, and milk.
2. Stir together whole wheat flour, soy flour, wheat germ, baking powder, nutmeg, and salt in a separate bowl; set aside.
3. In a small bowl, combine eggs, honey, oil, and molasses; blend well.
4. Add the egg mixture to the soaked bran flakes mixture; mix until combined.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the bran mixture, stirring just enough to moisten.
6. Spoon the batter into paper-lined 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling each cup about 2/3 full.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
